race.comment: Tricky. MINKS WRITTEN (8) resumed much improved winning a Maiden comfortably at Wagga. Lifted strongly but just failed to pick up the winner by a neck last start over 1000m at Gundagai. Should be near her peak for this and can bounce back. GIDDY GIRL (2) broke her Maiden  over 1000m at Mornington when resuming, scoring by 1.75 lengths from the front. Sparingly raced and arrives here on a 22-day return. Maps for a soft run and she has more to offer. POMBIA (4) resumes with an easy Maiden win at Canberra over 1000m, and kept on the fresh side, is in the mix. THE BIV (7) has a wide gate but will find this easier than Gosford. Won an Orange Maiden first-up from the speed.
